name: Almond Tea Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 Minutes Bake Time: 10 to 12 Minutes
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream the Butter Flavor Crisco with milk and almond extract using an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined. Beat in granulated sugar.
3. Sift together flour, slivered almonds, and salt into the bowl with the butter mixture. Stir until fully incorporated. Form the dough into balls, using one level measuring tablespoon for each cookie.
4. Place the dough balls 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes. (The cookies will not brown; do not overbake.) Remove from the oven and transfer them to a cooling rack.
6. Roll the slightly warm cookies in confectioners sugar. Once completely cooled, roll them again in confectioners sugar.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
